rationale: The previous judge report claimed that Challenge 5 was truncated, but upon manual inspection of the provided source for the selected commit (774b143bd53c350c9727a3856e993720ba21ef2c), the code options in Challenge 5 are actually fully intact and correct. The Hebrew translation is high quality, maintains Dan's style, and preserves all MDX components and logic correctly. No further fixes are required.
